home.title: ask away
home.sectionStart: Click any of these to get started
home.sectionIdeas: Ideas of what you can do

explain.title: Explain something
explain.description: Help me understand a topic, a document, a news article, etc.

summarize.title: Summarize
summarize.description: Make a document, article or communication more concise.

write.title: Write for me
write.description: Help me write an email, a letter, a text message, etc.

image.title: Explain an image
image.description: Upload a letter, a receipt, a bill, etc.

health.title: Get health information
health.description: Ask about symptoms, medication, nutrition, etc.

decide.title: Help me decide
decide.description: Get help with any decision in your life.

trip.title: Go somewhere
trip.description: Ask about a city visit, an itinerary or a night out.

recipe.title: Find a recipe
recipe.description: Suggestions based on your cravings or ingredients.

homeInput.placeholder: What do you need help with today?

ui.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes, double check important information.
ui.uploadHint: or drag and drop — up to 5
ui.exampleQuestionsDesc: Try one of these to get started.
ui.imageUploadError: Sorry, we can only support up to {max} images at a time.
ui.errorGeneral: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
ui.initialQuestion: What would you like help with?
ui.imagePlaceholder: What would you like to know about this image?

tips.1bold: Say it in your own words:
tips.1body: No special language needed, just describe what you're looking for as you naturally would to another person.
tips.2bold: A little context goes a long way:
tips.2body: The more you share about your situation, the more helpful the answer will be.
tips.3body: If the first answer isn't quite right, just say so! You can ask to make it shorter, simpler, or try a different approach.
